title: Safe Dial Lock Instructions: A Guide for Every Brand
excerpt: Dial lock instructions vary by brand. Learn how to open a Sargent & Greenleaf, LaGard, or Kaba Mas dial safe lock step by step.

title: Dial Locks vs Electronic Locks: Which Safe Lock Is Right for You?
excerpt: Comparing the reliability, security, and convenience of mechanical dial locks versus electronic keypad locks for home and business safes.

title: The Importance of Servicing Your Safe: Prevent Problems Before They Start
excerpt: Regular safe maintenance prevents lock failures, stuck bolts, and costly emergency openings. Here's what every safe owner should know.

title: How to Choose the Right Safe for Your Needs: A Homeowner's Guide
excerpt: From gun safes to fire chests to commercial vaults — learn how to match the right safe to your valuables, budget, and risk level.

title: What's the Best Fire Rating for a Safe in a Secluded Area?
excerpt: Fire ratings matter more in remote or unattached structures. Learn which UL and ETL ratings to look for based on your location.

title: Safe Opening Methods: Non-Destructive, Precision Drilling, and Burglary Techniques
excerpt: From non-destructive manipulation to precision drilling to criminal methods — a transparent look at how safes are opened, what's professional, and what puts your safe at risk.
